metadata.description: HumanLayer AI agent workflows — planning, research, implementation, debugging, and session handoff commands with specialized subagents

plugins.name: humanlayer-workflows
plugins.description: Complete AI agent workflow toolkit: implementation planning, codebase research, plan execution/validation, git commits, PR descriptions, debugging, session handoffs, and Linear ticket management. Includes 6 specialized subagents for code analysis, pattern finding, document research, and web search.

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: UI/UX design intelligence for web and mobile. Includes 50+ styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 161 product types, 99 UX guidelines, and 25 chart types across 10 stacks. Searchable database with priority-based recommendations.

plugins.name: spec-driven
plugins.description: Spec-driven agent workflow: 12 commands for planning, implementation, verification, investigation, and session continuity. Generic, cross-tool (Claude Code + Cursor). Includes 4 specialized subagents, 2 always-on rules, and 4 spec templates.
